key_insight: PA-SciML adds a verification-first, physics-audited workflow to agentic SciML so model selection is based on checkable mechanics requirements, not just low prediction error.
engineering_relevance: For solid mechanics surrogate modeling, this helps ensure trained models respect boundary conditions, scaling, superposition, and causality before they are trusted in design or simulation workflows.
method: Fix the scoring evaluator before search.
Derive machine-checkable physics requirements and audit each candidate on predicted outputs.
Search for high-violation cases over prescribed inputs or load histories without using reference fields.
evidence_signal: In the reported examples, the selected elastic surrogate achieved lower validation error than an error-only baseline and passed the common checks, while in transient elastodynamics an error-only baseline with similar mean error failed a stricter causality check.
watch_item: Physics verification is only as strong as the chosen checks and coverage of the input/load-history search, so omitted failure modes may still slip through.
paper_title: Physics-Audited Agentic Discovery in Scientific Machine Learning
